subject: [SO] 15.1.1 release
commit_message:
[SO] 15.1.1 release

- deploy 1.15.2 images of so repo
- deploy 1.12.3 image of cnf-adapater
- deploy 1.10.0 image of nssmf-adapter
- deploy 1.10.0 image of oof-adapter
- images contain removal of AAF dependency
- rename auth-related properties
  - mso.config.cadi.aafId -> mso.auth.user
  - mso.auth              -> mso.auth.password

Issue-ID: SO-4159
Change-Id: I4f40f41c6fb525a8e4e1381ff1788b1d6b31070a
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <Fiete.Ostkamp@telekom.de>
